name: the fool
upright: a step into the unseen. beginnings, innocence, the courage to leap before the ground is certain. the path opens because you walk it.
reversed: hesitation at the edge — or a leap taken blind. recklessness disguised as freedom, fear disguised as prudence.

name: the magician
upright: all the tools are already on the table. will, focus, manifestation — the moment desire becomes act.
reversed: scattered intent, tricks of the hand. power used to impress rather than create; check who is holding the wand.

name: the high priestess
upright: the answer is behind the veil, not in the noise. intuition, silence, knowledge that arrives without words.
reversed: the inner voice muted by other people's certainty. secrets kept too long, or a truth you refuse to hear from yourself.

name: the empress
upright: abundance that grows on its own once tended. creation, sensuality, care — the garden answers the gardener.
reversed: creative drought, smothering care, neglect of the body. the soil asks to be left fallow before it blooms again.

name: the emperor
upright: structure holds the wild in place. authority, order, boundaries drawn with a steady hand.
reversed: control hardened into rigidity, or a throne no one is sitting on. rules that outlived their reason.

name: the hierophant
upright: tradition as a keeper of meaning. teachers, rituals, the comfort of a path already walked by many.
reversed: dogma over truth. the ritual has emptied out — time to write your own liturgy.

name: the lovers
upright: a choice that defines you more than it defines the outcome. union, alignment, two flames sharing one air.
reversed: disharmony, avoidance of the choice itself. values pulling in opposite directions under one roof.

name: the chariot
upright: victory through held tension. opposing forces harnessed, not silenced — motion by pure will.
reversed: the reins slipping, direction lost to speed. ambition dragging the driver instead of carrying them.

name: strength
upright: the lion is calmed, not caged. quiet courage, patience, power that does not need to raise its voice.
reversed: self-doubt gnawing at resolve, or force where gentleness was asked. the beast senses fear before anything else.

name: the hermit
upright: withdrawal as a form of seeking. solitude, the single lantern, wisdom found off the map.
reversed: isolation past its purpose. the lantern turned inward so long the road has grown over.

name: wheel of fortune
upright: the turn you did not order but needed. cycles, fate, luck arriving through a door you forgot to lock.
reversed: resisting the turn of the wheel. a cycle repeating because its lesson is still unpaid.

name: justice
upright: cause meets consequence with clean hands. truth, fairness, the weight of a decision measured exactly.
reversed: the scales tipped by what goes unsaid. accountability avoided — the debt does not disappear, it accrues.

name: the hanged man
upright: surrender as strategy. the pause, the inverted view, wisdom that only appears upside down.
reversed: stalling dressed as patience. hanging on out of habit — the sacrifice stopped meaning anything.

name: death
upright: an ending that clears the ground. transformation, release, the necessary closing of a door.
reversed: clinging to what has already ended. decay held in place by refusal — let the season change.

name: temperance
upright: two cups, one continuous pour. balance, patience, alchemy of opposites into something drinkable.
reversed: excess in one vessel, drought in the other. the mixture separating — return to the middle path.

name: the devil
upright: the chain is loose enough to lift off. bondage, desire, shadows you keep because they keep you warm.
reversed: the first tug against the chain. awareness of the trap — the beginning of walking out of it.

name: the tower
upright: the lightning does in a second what doubt could not do in years. collapse of the false, sudden clarity.
reversed: a slow-motion tower, dismantled brick by brick — or disaster narrowly delayed. the foundation still asks its question.

name: the star
upright: after the tower, the open sky. hope, healing, water poured back into the dark earth.
reversed: faith running thin, the sky overcast. the star is still there — it is the looking up that lapsed.

name: the moon
upright: the path lit only by reflection. dreams, illusion, instinct — not everything howling is a threat.
reversed: fog beginning to lift, fears revealed as shapes of ordinary things. confusion releasing its grip.

name: the sun
upright: warmth without condition. clarity, vitality, joy that does not need an argument.
reversed: light dimmed by a passing cloud — delayed success, joy postponed by overthinking. the sun has not moved.

name: judgement
upright: the call that wakes what was buried. reckoning, forgiveness, rising to a truer version of the self.
reversed: the trumpet heard and ignored. self-judgement so loud it drowns the actual call.

name: the world
upright: the circle closes and holds. completion, integration, the dance at the end of the long road.
reversed: a cycle almost finished, one thread hanging. seek the missing piece before beginning the next round.
